scope: Dead-code detection. orphans.py: public_used (callers=1, in __all__, NOT orphan), public_orphan (0 callers, NOT in __all__, ORPHAN), used_internally (0 callers, dunder/test skip rules — actually none of those, ORPHAN). __all__ = [public_used] allowlists public_used. Asserts >=1 record (public_orphan is the canonical orphan; used_internally also passes through the heuristic).
